intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“coast 出发 -> storm 和 rock -> 整夜游向 shore -> light ahead -> cliffs -> hospital”的求生路线读顺。

sentences.text: Nearly a week passed before the girl was able to explain what had happened to her.
sentences.focus_zh: Nearly a week passed 先给恢复后的时间；what had happened to her 是之前发生的事，要连成一组读。

sentences.text: One afternoon she set out from the coast in a small boat and was caught in a storm.
sentences.focus_zh: One afternoon 开始故事；from the coast 和 in a small boat 是出发信息，was caught in a storm 要读出突然陷入风暴。

sentences.text: Towards evening, the boat struck a rock and the girl jumped into the sea.
sentences.focus_zh: Towards evening 是接近傍晚；struck a rock 和 jumped into the sea 是事故链，要分清动作顺序。

sentences.text: Then she swam to the shore after spending the whole night in the water.
sentences.focus_zh: swam to the shore 是方向；after spending the whole night in the water 很长，要自然分组。

sentences.text: Early next morning, she saw a light ahead.
sentences.focus_zh: Early next morning 是新的时间；a light ahead 是转折点，ahead 要读成“前方”。

sentences.text: She knew she was near the shore because the light was high up on the cliffs.
sentences.focus_zh: because 后面解释原因；near the shore 和 high up on the cliffs 都是位置短语。

sentences.text: On arriving at the shore, the girl struggled up the cliff towards the light she had seen.
sentences.focus_zh: On arriving at the shore 先停一下；struggled up the cliff 和 towards the light she had seen 是艰难向光移动。

sentences.text: When she woke up a day later, she found herself in hospital.
sentences.focus_zh: When she woke up a day later 是恢复后的时间；found herself in hospital 是醒来发现自己在医院。
